# Vishnu's Techdex

> Personal knowledge index and portfolio of Vishnu, a software engineer.

## About

Vishnu is a software engineer who builds backend and full-stack applications. He is interested in GNU/Linux systems, Vim, and split keyboards, and is open to work.

## Technical skills

- Languages: Python and Go.
- Backend: FastAPI, Pydantic, Django, Celery, and REST APIs.
- Frontend: React.
- Infrastructure: GNU/Linux, Git, Docker, and AWS.
- Databases: PostgreSQL and DynamoDB.

## Site content

- Curated videos, articles, papers, podcasts, and people relevant to software engineering.
- Personal blog posts and project notes.
